plan_metadata.name: General Teams Agent OpenAI py Local Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the dropdown menu under the "New Project" interface in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.

Click on the "General Teams Agent" option within the dropdown menu titled "Teams Agent or App Using Teams AI Library" to select the agent description: "Agent that chats with users in Teams built with Teams AI Library and connects to LLMs."
Click the "Python Preview" option in the "Programming Language" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" selection prompt to choose or locate the project's root folder.
Click the "TERMINAL" tab at the bottom center of the Visual Studio Code window to focus the integrated terminal panel.
Press Ctrl+F in the Visual Studio Code editor to open the Find search bar for searching within the currently active terminal panel.

parameters.text: invalid subscription key or wrong API endpoint

steps.description: Type text: 'invalid subscription key or wrong API endpoint' into the search input box within the Find panel of the Terminal tab in Visual Studio Code.
@assertion there's "invalid subscription key or wrong API endpoint" exist in terminal log.
